# Rizz Jobs

> Real-time Indian Government Job Notifications, Exam Alerts & Recruitment Updates

Rizz Jobs (https://rizzjobs.in) is a daily-updated portal covering every major government exam and recruitment drive in India. All notification data is sourced directly from official government portals (.gov.in, .nic.in) and verified before publication.

## What this site covers

- UPSC (Civil Services, NDA, CDS, CAPF, etc.)
- SSC (CGL, CHSL, MTS, GD Constable, CPO, etc.)
- Banking (IBPS PO/Clerk, SBI PO/Clerk, RBI, NABARD, etc.)
- Railway (RRB NTPC, ALP, Group D, JE, etc.)
- Defense & Police (Army, Navy, Air Force, CRPF, BSF, CISF, etc.)
- Teaching (KVS, NVS, CTET, state TET, DSSSB, etc.)
- Engineering (DRDO, ISRO, BARC, PSU technical roles)
- Medical (AIIMS, NHM, ESIC, state health departments)
- PSU (ONGC, BHEL, NTPC, SAIL, Coal India, etc.)
- State Jobs (all major state PSC exams — UPPSC, BPSC, MPSC, RPSC, etc.)
- 10th / 12th Pass (multi-tasking, constable, railway apprentice, etc.)

## Content structure

Each notification page includes:
- Official link to the government portal
- Vacancy count and post-wise breakdown
- Important dates (application start/end, exam date, result date)
- Eligibility criteria (education, age, experience)
- Application fee by category (General, OBC, SC/ST, EWS)
- Selection process steps
- How to apply (step-by-step)
- FAQs (common candidate questions with answers)

## URL structure

- Homepage (all notifications): https://rizzjobs.in/
- Individual exam detail: https://rizzjobs.in/exam/[slug]
- Category pages: https://rizzjobs.in/[category]
  - /banking, /railway, /defense-police, /upsc-ssc, /teaching
  - /engineering, /medical, /psu, /10th-12th-pass
  - /admit-cards, /results, /state-jobs
- Search: https://rizzjobs.in/?q=[query]

## Data freshness

Content is scraped from official sources daily and enriched with AI research. Each notification page shows the last updated timestamp. Exam dates and deadlines are in YYYY-MM-DD format (IST timezone).

## Sitemap

https://rizzjobs.in/sitemap.xml
